services.title: Services
services.includes: What to expect from this service
services.residential_detail: Residential cleaning is tailored to your home and schedule. Every room is cleaned with care, using products that are safe for your family and pets.

client_info.title: Interested in becoming a client?
client_info.intro: Here's everything you need to know about how the service works - simple, transparent, and professional.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.description: A free home visit is arranged to:
how_it_works.pricing: During the visit, you'll receive a personalized price proposal - always a fixed price including VAT, after the RUT tax deduction.
how_it_works.rut_info: The RUT deduction is applied directly to your invoice, so you only pay the reduced amount. All administration with the tax office is handled for you.
how_it_works.rut_link: Want to learn more about the RUT deduction? Read more here.
how_it_works.rut_note: If the RUT deduction is not approved, the full amount will be charged.

supplies.title: Cleaning supplies
supplies.description: Cleaning is carried out with products provided by you. Product recommendations tailored to your home are available.
supplies.link: View the recommended cleaning list here.

important_info.title: Important information
important_info.description: To protect your home, heavy furniture is not moved, such as:
items: sofas
large appliances
heavy furnishings
important_info.note: If you would like cleaning behind or underneath these items, please move them before the visit.
important_info.balcony: Balcony cleaning is not included in the standard service and can be booked separately.

insurance.title: Safety & insurance
insurance.description: The service is insured through Trygg-Hansa, which means you are fully covered in case of any unexpected incidents, such as damage or lost keys.

agreement.title: Agreement
agreement.trial: Not sure yet? A trial cleaning is also available with no commitment.

extra_services.title: Additional services
extra_services.pricing: If a service does not have a fixed price, it is charged hourly: 200 SEK/hour
extra_services.note: Note: This hourly rate does not apply to regular home cleaning services.

checklist.title: Cleaning checklist
items: dish soap
window cleaner (spray)
multi-surface cleaner (e.g. Jif/Cif/Vim)
toilet cleaner
kitchen sponges
dish brush
steel wool (Svinto)
floor cleaning solution
garbage bags
vacuum bags
vacuum cleaner
bucket + mop (preferably with a wringing system)

client_info.footer: Looking forward to helping you create a clean, fresh, and comfortable home.

services.deep_clean_desc: Spring cleaning or guests on the way? It can be taken care of for you
services.deep_clean_detail: A thorough top-to-bottom clean that goes beyond regular cleaning and reaches areas often overlooked. Perfect for spring cleaning, after renovations, or ahead of special occasions
deep_clean_modal_content: Each service is individually assessed and tailored based on your location, your specific needs, and professional recommendations. Get in touch to create a suitable cleaning plan.
You provide standard cleaning supplies yourself. If more advanced or specialized equipment is required, it is brought as needed.
services.window_clean_desc: Careful window cleaning for a spotless finish and maximum clarity
services.window_clean_detail: Window cleaning is carried out with precision and attention to detail for a spotless, streak-free finish, ensuring clear views and consistent quality.
window_clean_modal_content: For existing customers, one-time window cleaning is priced the same as a single home cleaning session.
New customers are welcome to get in touch, and window cleaning can be arranged upon request.
Professional equipment (Kärcher), telescopic poles, and ladders are used to safely reach higher windows.
For safety reasons, window cleaning is not carried out during the winter season.
No preparation is required on your part. Items such as vases, window decorations, and curtains are handled carefully and with attention.
Please note: balcony cleaning is not included in the standard service and can be booked separately.
services.extra_desc: Specialized cleaning for your specific needs. Tailored solutions for every situation
services.extra_detail: Specialized cleaning designed around your specific needs. Solutions are tailored to fit each situation with precision.
services.mail_body:
Hello,

I am interested in your cleaning services and would like more details.

extra_modal_content: Is your refrigerator starting to smell unpleasant? Have you forgotten what your oven originally looked like? Is your balcony no longer a place you enjoy spending time?
Share what needs to be done - it will be handled for you.
Below you will find prices for additional services:
Freezer cleaning - SEK 150 (must be defrosted beforehand)
Oven cleaning (including standard equipment and between glass panels) - SEK 200
Balcony cleaning (under 6 sqm, including windows) - SEK 500

about.title: About Me
about.text1: My name is Aleksandra, and I have over
about.text2: years of experience as a professional cleaner. For the past
about.text3: years, I have been successfully running my own cleaning services in Stockholm, building a strong reputation for reliability, high quality, and exceptional attention to detail.
about.text4: I specialize in premium home cleaning services tailored to each client's individual needs, including both regular maintenance cleaning and deep cleaning. My goal is to create clean, comfortable, and well-maintained living spaces where my clients can truly relax and feel at ease.
about.text5: Customer trust and safety are my top priorities. That is why I work in partnership with Trygg-Hansa. This provides full coverage in the unlikely event of accidental damage during cleaning or if keys are misplaced, giving my clients complete peace of mind.
about.text6: If you are looking for a reliable and experienced cleaner in Stockholm, I would be happy to help you keep your home spotless, fresh, and stress-free.
about.recommendations_modal_title: How is it working with me? Hear from my clients
about.recommendations_modal_hint: These are real client messages shared with permission. Click any bubble to open the full review screenshot.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything clients usually ask before booking.
faq.q1: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
faq.a1: Yes — clients provide their own cleaning products and equipment. Recommendations can be provided based on what works best for your home. For deep cleaning or specialized services, any required professional equipment is brought as needed.
faq.q2: How long does a standard home cleaning take?
faq.a2: It depends on the size and condition of your home. Most regular appointments take between 2 and 4 hours.
faq.q3: How do I get a price quote?
faq.a3: A free home visit is arranged to assess your home, understand your needs, and answer any questions. You then receive a fixed-price proposal including VAT, after the RUT deduction.
faq.q4: Can I try the service before committing?
faq.a4: Yes. A trial cleaning is available with no commitment. If you decide to continue, an ongoing contract is set up with no notice period required.
faq.a5: Absolutely. Weekly and bi-weekly cleaning plans are available. The best option for your home is discussed during the initial visit.
faq.q13: Do you protect my privacy and confidentiality?
faq.a13: Yes. Privacy and confidentiality are core principles. Every home, routine, and personal detail is handled with complete discretion.
faq.a6: Yes. The service is insured through Trygg-Hansa, which covers accidental damage during service and provides full peace of mind in case of incidents such as damage or lost keys.
faq.q7: How does the RUT deduction work?
faq.a7: If you are eligible in Sweden, the RUT deduction is applied directly to your invoice — you only pay the reduced amount. All administration with the tax office is handled on your behalf.
faq.q8: Do you clean homes with pets?
faq.a8: Yes, the service is pet-friendly. Small household pets such as cats, fish, or caged animals may remain at home during the cleaning, as long as they are secured. For safety reasons, dogs must be supervised or removed during the visit. Please note that pet areas such as litter boxes, cages, or aquariums are not cleaned.
faq.q9: What is not included in standard cleaning?
faq.a9: Standard cleaning does not include laundry, watering plants, balcony cleaning, cleaning above reachable height, or moving heavy furniture. Laundry, balcony cleaning, and some other tasks can be booked as additional services.
faq.q10: Is window cleaning available throughout the year?
faq.a10: No — window cleaning is not carried out during the winter season, and windows at heights that require specialist equipment or safety gear are not cleaned. Balcony washing is also not done during winter. For existing customers, window cleaning is priced the same as one regular cleaning session. New customers are welcome to get in touch for more information.
faq.q11: Do you wash carpets, mattresses, or other textiles?
faq.a11: No. Washing carpets, mattresses, duvets, and similar textiles requires specialist equipment that is not carried. These items fall outside the scope of the cleaning services.
faq.q12: Do you offer outdoor services such as gardening or snow removal?
faq.a12: No — the services are limited to indoor cleaning only. Gardening, snow shovelling, pool cleaning, and cleaning of open fireplaces, stoves, and chimneys are not carried out.

residentialGuide.title: House Cleaning Guide
residentialGuide.subtitle: Everything you should know about regular residential cleaning service.
residentialGuide.intro: This guide explains what is included in regular house cleaning and which limitations apply, so expectations stay clear for both sides.

section_a.title: What is included in this house cleaning service

general_info.title: General information
items: All surfaces and equipment that are easily accessible from floor level are cleaned.
For safety reasons, ladders or step stools are not used.
Cleaning above reachable height is included in deep cleaning, which is offered as an additional service.
Please ensure that all cleaning equipment is fully functional (e.g. vacuum cleaner, mop). Damaged or non-functioning equipment is not used.
If the necessary cleaning supplies are not provided, certain tasks may be skipped or specific areas may be left uncleaned.

For safety reasons, cleaning is not performed if a dog is left unsupervised in the home. Small household pets (such as cats, fish, or caged animals) may remain during the cleaning, provided they are secured and do not interfere with the service.
For safety and legal reasons, no service is performed in a home with minors unless a responsible adult is present.
Please note that regular home cleaning is designed to maintain cleanliness, not restore heavily worn or neglected surfaces.
Work is always carried out carefully and thoroughly, but worn items cannot be made to look new.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
items: Cleaning of sink, countertops, and taps
Wiping tiles above the sink
Exterior cleaning of kitchen cabinet doors
Cleaning of all accessible surfaces (tables, chairs, windowsills, etc.)
Vacuuming skirting boards and edges
Spot cleaning of doors (removing visible stains)
Vacuuming and mopping floors
Cleaning the waste area under the sink
Emptying coffee machine (grounds/capsules) and rinsing the coffee pot
Cleaning the microwave (inside and outside), if easily accessible
Loading the dishwasher and unloading it once per visit
Disposal of garbage

bathroom_toilet.title: Bathroom & Toilet
items: Cleaning of shower, shower cabin, and bathtub
Cleaning of sink and toilet
Cleaning of accessible taps and pipes
Spot cleaning of walls and tiles (visible stains only)
Polishing mirrors
Exterior dusting of bathroom furniture and appliances
Vacuuming and mopping floors
Disposal of garbage

living_bedrooms.title: Living room & Bedrooms
items: Vacuuming floors, carpets, and skirting boards
Mopping floors
Dusting of furniture, lamps, windowsills, radiators, doors, frames, moldings, and accessible surfaces
Bed making (linen change available upon request)
Disposal of garbage

not_included.title: What is not included
items: Lamps are not cleaned unless they are easily accessible from floor level.
Crystal lamps and chandeliers are not cleaned under any circumstances.
Large amounts of dishes are not washed by hand (maximum approx. 15 minutes per visit).
Watering plants is not included in standard home cleaning. If you are away for a longer holiday and leave a reminder, plants can be watered so they stay in good condition.
Laundry is not included in standard home cleaning. It can be booked as an additional service for an extra fee.
Household maintenance tasks are not provided, such as changing curtains, replacing light bulbs, or removing candle wax stains.
Need help with wardrobes and closets? Organization is available as an additional service for an extra fee.

pets.title: Pets
items: Cleaning after pets (e.g. litter boxes, cages, aquariums) is not included.
Feeding animals or changing their water is not included.
Dog walking is not included.

furniture_handling.title: Furniture & handling
items: Furniture or large appliances (e.g. refrigerators, washing machines) are not moved.
Carpets are not lifted, shaken, or beaten.

sensitive_surfaces.title: Sensitive surfaces
items: TV screens and other screens are cleaned using dry methods only.
Special cleaning products can be used only if provided by the customer and at the customer's responsibility.

additional_notes.title: Additional notes
items: When cleaning the fridge (extra service), only items that are visibly spoiled may be disposed of. Expiry dates are not checked and decisions are not made based on date labels.
Home cleaning applies only to indoor living areas (garages, storage rooms, yards, and similar spaces are not included).
Scrubbing of grout/joints is not included in standard cleaning (available as an additional service).
